request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2024 Boston plot was stopped because we had the tools to track these threats. Critics say it's about civil liberties, but when you're dealing with sophisticated threats, you need sophisticated tools. We can't afford to be naive about security in 2026. #NationalSecurityFirst
